<jats:title>Abstract</jats:title>
               <jats:p>Motivation: The naked mole rat ( Heterocephalus glaber ) is an exceptionally long-lived and cancer-resistant rodent native to East Africa. Although its genome was previously sequenced, here we report a new assembly sequenced by us with substantially higher N50 values for scaffolds and contigs.</jats:p>
